From: Nautical Supply International (NSI) DMCC <carolina@nauticalsupply.co.uk>
Sent: 14 November 2025 17:19
To: Deepesh Majigamkar <chartering@varitasnavigation.com>
Subject: NSI Daily Market Report 14/11/2025
Oil prices had experienced a sharp 4% slide on Tuesday...
Russian flagship crude Urals was priced $19.40 per barrel below Brent on a free-on-board (FOB) basis at the Russian Baltic Sea port of Primorsk and at the port of Novorossiysk on the Black Sea
